director.name: 迈克尔·龙 Michael J. Long

this_title: Alien Paradox: Legacy of the UFO
introduction: The US government is now acknowledging the existence of UFOs and UAPs and they are very concerned with UFO sightings occurring daily around the world. From Roswell to alien abductions, sightings and the government cover-up, the best minds in the UFO field give their response to the UFO question and where the study is going. The truth is coming into the light and the answers may shock you.
chinese_title: Alien Paradox: Legacy of the UFO
